name: JNIAtlas
description: Map JNI entry points from an APK and explore JNI→native call graphs.
longdescription: JNIAtlas: (1) Import APK — apply JNI prototypes to native methods like classic JNIAnalyzer. (2) JNI Radar — list Java_… JNI exports in the open .so and the functions each one calls.
